policy_config.positioning: method-discovery fixed-budget compact compiler slice; not a benchmark

budget.budget_basis: compact_v1 rule cost plus one medium-rule margin; still below the cost of all expected rules

policies.execution-aware-fixed-budget: risk-cost plus verifier expectedness and previous failure evidence, still under the same budget

policies.decision_rule: Keep high-priority supported rules in ledger order until budget is reached.
policies.explanation: Retains high-priority supported rules only; it stays compact but misses execution-critical medium-priority rules.

policies.decision_rule: Greedy value-per-token selection using priority and material evidence.
policies.explanation: Selects good value-per-token supported rules, but without execution evidence it can keep R007 while still missing a previously failed rule.

policies.decision_rule: Greedy value-per-token selection using priority, material evidence, expected verifier coverage, and execution failure evidence.
policies.explanation: Uses failure evidence to pull failure-critical rules into the fixed budget. It recovers R005, R006 and drops R003, R007; remaining missed rules: R003. Failure-critical still missed: none.

conclusion.summary: Execution-aware fixed-budget selection recovers R005/R006 without exceeding the fixed budget, but it must sacrifice R003 and therefore does not fully pass the verifier.
conclusion.boundary: Toy comparison on current API review rules/cases only; not a benchmark or general compact compiler proof.
